message:
fix(tui): improve message body truncation and thread timestamp formatting

- Add graceful message body truncation that breaks at word boundaries
  instead of mid-character for long message previews
- Fix thread timestamp display to use relative time for recent messages
  and absolute time for older ones
- Add connection retry logging for sync DB reconnection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
